ai_chat_welcome: Hi! I'm here to help with {name}. Ask me to explain their latest therapist assignment, suggest games and activities, or answer questions about their development.
ai_chat_welcome_with_assignment: Hi! I'm here to help with {name}. Their latest therapist assignment is "{title}". Ask me to explain it, suggest games, or anything about their development.
ai_chat_help_unknown: I can help with therapist assignments and play activity ideas. What do you need?

ai_chat_mood_question: What is your child's mood? Calm, Energetic, Tired, Fussy, or Curious?
ai_chat_time_question: How much time do you have? 5 min, 15 min, or 30+ min?
ai_chat_generating: Perfect! Let me put together an activity for you…

learn_media_unreachable: Could not load this media. Check that the URL is valid and publicly reachable.
screening_missing_answer_body: Please answer all questions on this page first.
screening_guidance_moderate: Please complete M-CHAT follow-up or consult a therapist.
screening_guidance_high: High-risk result. Please book an appointment with a therapist.
screening_medical_advice: Contact a therapist for medical advice.
screening_no_children: No children found. Add a child first.
screening_guest_banner: Guest mode: result is shown on screen only and no report is generated.
screening_q1_text: If you point at something across the room, does your child look at it?
screening_q1_example: If you point at a toy or an animal, does your child look at the toy or animal?
screening_q2_text: Have you ever wondered if your child might be deaf?
screening_q3_text: Does your child play pretend or make-believe?
screening_q3_example: Pretend to drink from an empty cup, pretend to talk on a phone, or pretend to feed a doll or stuffed animal?
screening_q4_text: Does your child like climbing on things?
screening_q5_text: Does your child make unusual finger movements near his or her eyes?
screening_q5_example: Does your child wiggle his or her fingers close to his or her eyes?
screening_q6_text: Does your child point with one finger to ask for something or to get help?
screening_q6_example: Pointing to a snack or toy that is out of reach?
screening_q7_text: Does your child point with one finger to show you something interesting?
screening_q7_example: Pointing to an airplane in the sky or a big truck in the road?
screening_q8_text: Is your child interested in other children?
screening_q8_example: Does your child watch other children, smile at them, or go to them?
screening_q9_text: Does your child show you things by bringing them to you or holding them up for you to see?
screening_q9_example: Showing you a flower, a stuffed animal, or a toy truck?
screening_q10_text: Does your child respond when you call his or her name?
screening_q10_example: Does he or she look up, talk or babble, or stop what he or she is doing when you call his or her name?
screening_q11_text: When you smile at your child, does he or she smile back at you?
screening_q12_text: Does your child get upset by everyday noises?
screening_q12_example: Does your child scream or cry to noise such as a vacuum cleaner or loud music?
screening_q14_text: Does your child look you in the eye when you are talking to him or her, playing with him or her, or dressing him or her?
screening_q15_text: Does your child try to copy what you do?
screening_q15_example: Wave bye-bye, clap, or make a funny noise when you do?
screening_q16_text: If you turn your head to look at something, does your child look around to see what you are looking at?
screening_q17_text: Does your child try to get you to watch him or her?
screening_q17_example: Does your child look at you for praise, or say "look" or "watch me"?
screening_q18_text: Does your child understand when you tell him or her to do something?
screening_q18_example: If you don't point, can your child understand "put the book on the chair"?
screening_q19_text: If something new happens, does your child look at your face to see how you feel about it?
screening_q19_example: If he or she hears a strange or funny noise, will he or she look at your face?
screening_q20_text: Does your child like movement activities?
screening_q20_example: Being swung or bounced on your knee?
screening_report_not_found: No autism screening report found for this child.
screening_report_none: No report found for this child.
